abilities.description: Discard a card. If a red card is discarded this way, CARDNAME deals 4 damage to any target.
Each player discards their hand, then draws three cards.
Cast any number of red instant and/or sorcery cards from your graveyard without paying their mana costs.

effect.description: Cast any number of red instant and/or sorcery cards from your graveyard without paying their mana costs.
effect.name: Play
